name: Almond Cresent Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a large bowl, combine softened butter or margarine, brown sugar, flour, 2 tablespoons milk, and 3/8 teaspoon almond extract. Mix well until combined.
3. Separate the dough into 4 long rectangles. Firmly press at the perforations to seal each rectangle.
4. Brush melted butter mixed with an additional 3/8 teaspoon almond extract over the dough.
5. Sprinkle chopped almonds over the dough and roll up jellyroll fashion.
6. Cut each roll of dough into 3 slices and place in greased muffin cups.
7. Place the muffin pan on a baking sheet. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Invert the rolls immediately onto a cooling rack when done.
9. Combine confectioners' sugar, 1 tablespoon milk, and 3/8 teaspoon almond extract in a small bowl. Drizzle over the hot rolls before serving.
Makes 12 buns
